prompt:
Our order exports land as CSV and I am done massaging them in spreadsheets every Monday. I want a little importer + report tool, `csvreport.py`, backed by sqlite3. Session I have in mind:

    $ python3 csvreport.py import orders.csv --db sales.db
    imported 12 rows into orders
    $ python3 csvreport.py report by-region --db sales.db
    west	447.45	5
    east	392.46	4
    north	196.17	3

import: table name is the CSV filename stem, lowercased (Orders.csv -> orders; assume stems are simple names). Infer each column's type from the data: INTEGER if every non-blank value parses as an int, otherwise REAL if every non-blank value parses as a number, otherwise TEXT. Blank cells are stored as NULL and don't vote in inference; a column that's entirely blank (or has no rows at all) is TEXT. In a TEXT column, store everything as a string -- even values that happen to look numeric; I got burned by a mixed column where half the entries turned into integers. Re-importing a file replaces its table wholesale, no appending, and other tables in the db stay put. Two gotchas from the last prototype: headers can be anything including SQL keywords (we genuinely have a `when` column), so quote your identifiers; and this is real CSV, quoted fields with embedded commas must survive.

report NAME --db FILE runs canned queries against the `orders` table (columns: order_id, order_date as YYYY-MM-DD, region, product, quantity, unit_price; an order's amount is quantity*unit_price; money always printed with exactly 2 decimals; output columns separated by single tabs):
- by-region: region, total amount, number of orders; sorted by total descending, ties by region A-Z
- top-products: product, total amount; descending, ties A-Z; honors --limit N, default 3
- monthly: month as YYYY-MM taken from order_date, total, number of orders; ascending by month

Errors: missing import file or running a report before anything was imported -> exit 1, message on stderr. Unknown report name -> exit 2. Split the code up -- inference, import, and the report queries shouldn't live in one blob. Acceptance is `python3 test_csvreport.py` (it also uses the shipped orders.csv; leave both files alone).
